strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth oscillator detuned with .vowel('a') or .vowel('e') for supersaw character, .room(0.6).delay(0.5)
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with low .lpf() sweep using perlin for movement, .gain(0.8)
strudel_approach.pads: stack of 3-4 sawtooth oscillators with .room(0.8).delay(0.25), slow .lpf() modulation via perlin
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') on every beat, s('hh') on 16ths with velocity variation, s('cp') on 2 and 4
strudel_approach.effects: .jux(rev) on lead for stereo width, .delay(0.375) for dotted-eighth echoes

sub_genres.name: Progressive Trance
characteristic_elements: less dramatic breakdowns than classic trance

strudel_approach.lead: triangle oscillator with slow perlin-driven .lpf() sweeps, .delay(0.5).room(0.4)
strudel_approach.bass: sine oscillator with subtle .lpf() envelope, steady 8th-note pattern
strudel_approach.pads: sawtooth with heavy .lpf() filtering and .room(0.7), slow chord progressions
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') four-on-floor, layered percussion with s('perc') patterns, shaker loops
strudel_approach.effects: perlin-modulated .lpf() on most elements for evolving texture, .jux(rev) on percussion

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .vowel('a') for brightness, .room(0.5).delay(0.33), pitch bends on melodic phrases
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with tight .lpf() envelope, 16th-note rolling pattern, .gain() modulated for sidechain effect
strudel_approach.pads: stacked sawtooth oscillators with .room(0.9), open .lpf() for full spectrum, .jux(rev)
strudel_approach.drums: punchy s('bd') on every beat, s('oh') on offbeats, s('cp') with .room(0.3) on 2 and 4
strudel_approach.effects: automate .gain() in pumping pattern for sidechain simulation, .delay(0.5) on leads

sub_genres.name: Psytrance
characteristic_elements: heavy use of resonant filter sweeps

strudel_approach.pads: sine oscillator drones with .room(0.9), sparse and dark
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') on every beat with short decay, s('hh') on 16ths, minimal s('cp'), layered tribal percussion

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with high .lpq(20) resonance and perlin-swept .lpf(), .distort(0.3) for grit
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth or square with .lpf() modulated by perlin, .lpq(15-25) for classic acid squelch, .slide() between notes

strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') four-on-floor, s('oh') on offbeats, s('hh') 16ths, s('cp') on 2 and 4

strudel_approach.lead: sine or triangle oscillator with .room(0.6), warm melodic phrases, .delay(0.33)

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth strings or horns with .room(0.4)
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth or square, funky octave patterns, .lpf(1500)
strudel_approach.pads: sawtooth string chords with .room(0.5).jux(rev)
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') four-on-floor, s('oh') on EVERY offbeat (defining element), s('cp') on 2 and 4
strudel_approach.effects: .room(0.4) for live feel, .jux(rev) for width, .delay(0.25) subtle

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .distort(0.5).vowel() cycling, aggressive FM-like tones
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with .distort(0.6).vowel() rapid cycling ('a','e','i','o','u'), .lpf() with fast perlin, extreme processing
strudel_approach.pads: none during drops — used only in intros/breakdowns with .room(0.7)
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') on 1 and 3, s('sd') on 3 (half-time), s('hh') sparse, massive fills before drops
strudel_approach.effects: .distort(0.5+) essential, .vowel() for growl bass, fast perlin on .lpf() for wobble, .jux(rev) for width

strudel_approach.lead: sine sparse melodic fragments with .room(0.6).delay(0.5), dub echoes
strudel_approach.bass: sine sub bass, very heavy and deep, .lpf(150), simple powerful patterns, occasional pitch wobble
strudel_approach.pads: dark drones with .room(0.8).lpf(500), cavernous and minimal
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') on 1 and 3, s('sd') with .room(0.5) on 3, sparse s('hh'), heavy .delay() on percussion for dub effect
strudel_approach.effects: .room(0.6) and .delay(0.5) for dub space, keep it minimal and deep, perlin on sub pitch for wobble

strudel_approach.lead: sine or sawtooth sparse elements with .delay(0.5) for dub echoes
strudel_approach.bass: sine sub or sawtooth with .distort() for wobble, .vowel() for growl
strudel_approach.pads: dark and minimal with .room(0.7)
strudel_approach.drums: half-time: kick on 1 and 3, snare on 3, sparse hi-hats
strudel_approach.effects: .delay(0.5) for dub space, .distort() and .vowel() for bass design, .room(0.5)

strudel_approach.lead: square or sawtooth with .lpf(2000), robotic sequences, .delay(0.25)
strudel_approach.bass: square with .lpf(800), sequenced patterns, mechanical and precise
strudel_approach.pads: minimal — square wave stabs with .room(0.3)
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd:3') 808 kick, s('sd:3') 808 snare, s('hh:3') crisp hats, s('cp') claps, robotic programming
strudel_approach.effects: .lpf() for classic analog filter sound, .delay(0.25) for robotic echoes, .vowel() for vocoder effect

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .distort(0.3).lpf(3000), big and aggressive, .jux(rev) for massive width
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with .distort(0.3).lpf(600), heavy pumping bassline, .gain() modulated for sidechain
strudel_approach.pads: sawtooth chords with .room(0.5), big room stabs
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') punchy four-on-floor, s('cp') on 2 and 4, s('hh') 8ths, s('oh') offbeats
strudel_approach.effects: .distort(0.3) for aggression, .gain() modulation for sidechain pump, .jux(rev) for width, .room(0.4)

strudel_approach.lead: square or sawtooth with .lpf() for robotic character
strudel_approach.bass: square with .lpf(800), precise sequenced patterns
strudel_approach.pads: minimal stabs
strudel_approach.drums: 808-style patterns, mechanical programming
strudel_approach.effects: .vowel() for vocoder, .delay(0.25) for robotic echoes, .lpf() for analog filter

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth chord stabs with .room(0.8).delay(0.75), heavy feedback delay for dub character
strudel_approach.bass: sine sub kick pattern, deep and minimal, .lpf(150)
strudel_approach.pads: sawtooth with .room(0.9).delay(0.5).lpf(1500), hazy and washed out, .jux(rev) for depth
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') deep four-on-floor, s('hh') with .delay(0.5).room(0.6) for dubby hats, s('rim') with .delay(0.75) and feedback
strudel_approach.effects: .delay(0.5-0.75) with high feedback is essential, .room(0.8+) for wash, perlin on .lpf() for slow hazy movement, .jux(rev) for stereo depth

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth detuned with .vowel('a'), euphoric melodies, .room(0.5).delay(0.25), .jux(rev) for supersaw width
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with .distort(0.5), reverse-bass style with pitch envelope, aggressive
strudel_approach.pads: stacked sawtooths with .room(0.7).jux(rev), big emotional chords
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') with .distort(0.4) on every beat (hardstyle kick is THE element), s('hh') 16ths, s('cp') with .room(0.3)
strudel_approach.effects: .distort(0.4+) on kick essential, .room(0.5) for anthemic space, .jux(rev) on leads for width

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .distort(0.6).hpf(1000), aggressive screeches, .lpq(15) for resonance
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with .distort(0.7), extremely distorted reverse-bass kick, raw and aggressive
strudel_approach.pads: dark noise textures with .room(0.5).lpf(800)
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') with extreme .distort(0.6), raw punishing kick, s('hh') sparse, s('sd') industrial
strudel_approach.effects: .distort(0.5+) everywhere, .hpf() for screech character, .room(0.4) for dark space

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .vowel() for supersaws or .distort() for screeches
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with .distort(0.5+), pitched reverse-bass kick pattern
strudel_approach.pads: sawtooth stacks with .room(0.6).jux(rev)
strudel_approach.drums: distorted kick on every beat is the defining element
strudel_approach.effects: .distort() is essential for hardstyle character, .room(0.5) for anthemic space

strudel_approach.lead: sine or square with rapid .speed() and .begin()/.end() variations, micro-tonal, .delay(0.125)
strudel_approach.bass: sine with glitchy rhythmic pattern, unpredictable
strudel_approach.pads: granular-style with .speed() variations on sustained tones, .room(0.6)
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') s('sd') s('hh') in irregular patterns with .speed() and .gain() randomization via perlin, stutter edits
strudel_approach.effects: perlin on .speed() and .gain() for glitch randomness, .delay() at unusual subdivisions, .jux(rev)

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with erratic .lpf() movement, .delay(0.125), atonal or chromatic runs
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth with .distort(0.3).lpf() via fast perlin, aggressive and complex
strudel_approach.pads: occasional atmospheric breaks with .room(0.8)
strudel_approach.drums: extremely fast and complex breakbeat patterns, s('break') chopped and rearranged at high speed, .speed() variations, time-signature changes
strudel_approach.effects: fast perlin on everything, .delay() at short times for frenetic echoes, .distort() for aggression

strudel_approach.lead: any oscillator with unconventional .lpf() and pitch patterns
strudel_approach.bass: varies — can be sine sub or distorted sawtooth
strudel_approach.pads: experimental textures with .room(0.7)
strudel_approach.drums: irregular complex patterns, glitchy processing, time-signature experimentation
strudel_approach.effects: perlin on everything for unpredictability, .delay() at unusual values, .jux(rev), .speed() variations

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .distort(0.2), brass-like stabs, .room(0.4)
strudel_approach.bass: sine 808-style with long sustain and pitch bend, .distort(0.15) for saturation, .lpf(200)
strudel_approach.pads: dark sawtooth with .room(0.6).lpf(1000), atmospheric
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') on 1 and 3, s('cp') on 3 (half-time), s('hh') rapid 32nd-note rolls with velocity variation, 808 patterns
strudel_approach.effects: .distort(0.15) on 808 bass for warmth, .room(0.4) on brass stabs, rapid .gain() variation on hi-hats for rolls

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth stacked with .vowel('a').room(0.5).jux(rev), lush supersaw chords with sidechain pumping via .gain() modulation
strudel_approach.bass: sine with pitch bends, melodic 808 patterns, .distort(0.1).lpf(200)
strudel_approach.pads: sawtooth with .room(0.7).jux(rev).lpf(3000), massive and emotional, .gain() pumping
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') half-time, s('cp') on 3, s('hh') trap rolls, softer processing than hard trap
strudel_approach.effects: .gain() modulation for sidechain pump on chords (essential), .room(0.6), .jux(rev) for supersaw width, .vowel() for character

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth brass stabs or supersaw chords
strudel_approach.bass: sine 808-style with pitch bends, .distort(0.15) for saturation
strudel_approach.pads: dark sawtooth with .room(0.6)
strudel_approach.drums: half-time: kick on 1 and 3, clap on 3, rapid hi-hat rolls in 32nds and triplets
strudel_approach.effects: .distort() on 808 bass, .room(0.4), rapid .gain() variation for hi-hat rolls

strudel_approach.lead: sawtooth with .distort(0.4).lpf(3000), raw and aggressive riffs
strudel_approach.bass: sawtooth or square with .distort(0.3).lpf(800), driving and punky
strudel_approach.pads: minimal — distorted stabs with .room(0.3)
strudel_approach.drums: s('bd') driving pattern, s('sd') aggressive, s('hh') raw 8ths, punk energy
strudel_approach.effects: .distort(0.3+) for raw punk character, .room(0.3) tight, .lpf() for lo-fi grit
